title: Introduction to Machine Learning
content: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.

title: Deep Learning and Neural Networks
content: Deep learning uses neural networks with many layers to model complex patterns in data, powering applications like image recognition and natural language processing.

title: Natural Language Processing Basics
content: NLP allows computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language, enabling applications like chatbots, translation, and sentiment analysis.

title: Python Programming for Beginners
content: Python is a beginner-friendly, high-level programming language known for its simple syntax and wide use in data science, web development, and automation.

title: How Search Engines Work
content: Search engines crawl the web, index content, and rank pages based on relevance using algorithms like PageRank and keyword matching.

title: Introduction to Vector Databases
content: Vector databases store high-dimensional embeddings and allow fast similarity search, making them ideal for semantic search and recommendation systems.

title: The Science of Happiness
content: Happiness is linked to positive social relationships, physical health, purpose, and gratitude. Psychology research shows these factors significantly boost well-being.

title: Climate Change and Global Warming
content: Climate change refers to long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns, largely caused by human activities like burning fossil fuels and deforestation.

title: Healthy Diet and Nutrition
content: A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins supports physical health, mental clarity, and disease prevention.

title: Cosine Similarity in Information Retrieval
content: Cosine similarity measures the angle between two vectors and is widely used in information retrieval to determine document relevance to a query.
